The function should take a list of musical notes and two vocal range bounds, and determine if all notes fall within the specified range. It should compare each note's pitch to the lower and upper bounds, ensuring that no note exceeds the range. If all notes are within the range, the function returns `True`; otherwise, it returns `False`.
